case_title: IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION VS. LISA HUYEN NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2021 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,615.00 FILED BY IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LISA HUYEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-01-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LISA HUYEN
ORDER CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. DOCUMENTS SENT TO DEFENDANT IN VIETNAMESE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LISA HUYEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-20-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CRISOSTOMO IBARRA, PRINCIPAL. DEFENDANT LISA HUYEN NGUYEN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG REQUIRES ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE SHOWING THE DEFENDANT RECIEVED DOCUMENTATION IN VIETNAMESE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-14-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-14-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISA HUYEN NGUYEN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2021 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO SEP-14-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION, REPRESENTED CRISOSTOMO IBARRA, PLAINTIFF'S PRINCIPLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISA HUYEN NGUYEN IS PRESENT. A VIETNAMESE INTERPERTER WAS NOT AVAILABLE TO ASSIST DEFENDANT IN TODAY'S MATTER AND IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW FOR A VIETNAMESE INTERPERER TO BE PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR VIETNAMESE INTERPERTER FOR DEFENDANT. MATTER CONTINUED TO SEP-14-2021 AT 10:00 A.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
